{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241036170CB2C205D40A1FF0F4C9"}"},"total":3649},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7184642017514439457","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的太绝了[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]不管是前面的副本还是后面男女主的相处构思都很巧妙，文笔也超好的[注意][注意][注意][注意]月筝因为熬夜看小说不小心猝死穿越到了虐文男女主的一个世界里，她按照剧情帮助男女主相爱[酷][酷]在路上，还顺手救了半妖沈弃，沈弃从此把小月筝当成他心里的光，后来经历了一系列的副本，男女主成功的在一起了。小月筝也爱上了沈弃[害羞][害羞][害羞]但是由于一系列的原因，小月筝还是离开了沈弃[快哭了][快哭了][快哭了]最终知道她穿越进了一本同人文，并不是原书，后来又返回到这个世界去救赎他的爱人[送心][送心][送心][送心]一些细节还是要大家自己去探索，推荐大家一起看看这本书[爱心][爱心][爱心]
推荐指数:★★★★★"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672804980,"group_id":"7120225664698944552","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"用你的可爱和温柔温暖每一天的阳光","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxuPBuLl0ihYJbT1mcjdpwiEhH+WYdPKFK9nM0w/zi9O","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/e94189fab6f24eeba77928d0cc1e6253~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881153&x-signature=9EGd9N0CxCJgIjctvapR0WTXXEQ%3D","user_id":"4177746478250830","user_name":"云"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4177746478250830","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1739023729,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7120225664698944552","book_info":{"abstract":"【双洁+1v1+HE+男主前期卑微忠犬后期偏执恋爱脑】

　　月筝穿成虐文女配，别人穿书还能自由控制身体，可她一到剧情点，身体会不受控制按原剧情走。

　　正当她苦恼的时候，她发现只要靠近书里早死的男配沈弃就可以不受控制。

　　为了摆脱控制，她选择找沈弃贴贴。

　　原以为一切都会往好的地方发展，结果她被强制下线了。

　　再次穿书，原本的身世悲惨的沈弃成了魔尊，他变得喜怒无常，手段暴戾，更恨极了那个承诺陪他一辈子又离开的人。

　　月筝以为沈弃恨极了她，可她不知沈弃夜夜都会来她榻前轻轻抚摸她，那银发魔尊的眸中带着眷恋痴迷。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o542c030d326c5cfcb53bebe1075d3b3a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"酥欣糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7120225664698944552","book_name":"坏了！捡来的美少年养成偏执狂了","book_short_name":"弃暗投月","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9302人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7120359769390449152","read_count":"9302","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"313246"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"164","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,穿越,反派,穿书,今穿古,HE,双洁,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/59b6a01d1fc53258995c8ffa25f65806~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503777&x-signature=hs4n6 　　月筝穿成虐文女配，别人穿书还能自由控制身体，可她一到剧情点，身体会不受控制按原剧情走。

　　正当她苦恼的时候，她发现只要靠近书里早死的男配沈弃就可以不受控制。

　　为了摆脱控制，她选择找沈弃贴贴。

　　原以为一切都会往好的地方发展，结果她被强制下线了。

　　再次穿书，原本的身世悲惨的沈弃成了魔尊，他变得喜怒无常，手段暴戾，更恨极了那个承诺陪他一辈子又离开的人。

　　月筝以为沈弃恨极了她，可她不知沈弃夜夜都会来她榻前轻轻抚摸她，那银发魔尊的眸中带着眷恋痴迷。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o542c030d326c5cfcb53bebe1075d3b3a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"酥欣糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7120225664698944552","book_name":"坏了！捡来的美少年养成偏执狂了","book_short_name":"弃暗投月","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9302人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7120359769390449152","read_count":"9302","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"313246"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"164","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,穿越,反派,穿书,今穿古,HE,双洁,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/59b6a01d1fc53258995c8ffa25f65806~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503777&x-signature=hs4n6 对于这本书的建议就是副本如果再写多一点就更圆满了[送心]很喜欢这本书的副本"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1665377086,"group_id":"7120225664698944552","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"加入番茄小说已有四五年，年代久远的一些不成熟评论大家笑笑就好","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5O1BLbL3N/E8LD0sQrafiizguuci9LS1vbYBda0msOA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/07343ae4201d469b97269d386c8afb2d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874907&x-signature=DBJlcM1OkI0DPymRGqPxl5%2BVgR4%3D","user_id":"3659593474378590","user_name":"渡烟火"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3659593474378590","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1735495483,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7120225664698944552","book_info":{"abstract":"【双洁+1v1+HE+男主前期卑微忠犬后期偏执恋爱脑】
